title: glyceria distans var. permixta
intro: Glyceria distans var. permixta, also known as Manna grass or Manna grass of the swamp, is a type of aquatic grass native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Glyceria distans var. permixta include its ability to treat various ailments such as digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and salves, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
